results.rendered_html: 2. parāmṛta (parā + mṛta) adj. der den Tod besiegt hat, keinem ferneren [Page4-0504] Tode mehr unterworfen: te brahmalokeṣu parāntakāle parāmṛtāḥ parimucyanti sarve  MUṆḌ. UP. 3,2,6 . paramamṛtamamaraṇadharmakaṃ brahmātmabhūtaṃ yeṣāṃ te parāmṛtā eva  ŚAṂK.
